title: Month Zero Sprint
description: Kick a hobby project back to life by tapping neon start-orbs at the right moment as nine months of momentum spin around your thumbs.

howToPlayJson.title: Month Zero Sprint
howToPlayJson.objective: Keep the project alive for a 3-minute run by launching the right neon orbs before they fade, surviving mistakes, and building a combo for the leaderboard.

controls.input: Tap a glowing orb as it crosses the bright START gate
controls.outcome: The orb converts into progress, adds score, and extends combo

controls.input: Press and hold a fading cracked orb for a short beat
controls.outcome: You recover a nearly lost month for bonus points, but miss other targets while holding

controls.input: Do not tap red burnout orbs or orbs outside the current rule pulse
controls.outcome: You preserve hearts and keep your multiplier alive

steps: Nine month-arcs form a circular timeline, each with a clearly marked START gate and a fading END zone.
Neon orbs spawn and travel along the arcs; bright fresh orbs score best when tapped at the START gate, with audio ticks telegraphing timing.
Every few seconds a large readable pulse flips the rule between START NOW and SALVAGE NOW.
In START NOW, only newly spawned bright orbs are safe to tap; older ones should be ignored.
In SALVAGE NOW, only cracked late-stage orbs are worth tapping; fresh ones become penalties if launched too early.
Missing too many valid orbs or tapping the wrong state drains hearts; losing all hearts ends the run immediately.
Speed, lane count, and mixed orb patterns escalate until the final month-rush where pulses flip faster and combo management decides the high
howToPlayJson.scoring: Each correct launch awards points based on timing accuracy and current combo. Consecutive correct taps raise a multiplier up to x8. Salvage saves are worth extra points and refill a small amount of combo decay, but wrong
tips: Watch the giant state banner and matching sound cue before tapping; the rule flip is the core twist.
Tap near the START gate for safer combo building, then use SALVAGE phases to rescue high-value cracked orbs.
Do not chase every orb; choosing the correct state target matters more than raw speed.
Use hold-saves only when the board is sparse or the bonus is worth the lane attention.
